protein_name: Potent circulating inhibitor of angiogenesis. Signals through the type I activin receptor ACVRL1 but not other Alks. Signaling through SMAD1 in endothelial cells requires TGF-beta coreceptor endoglin/ENG. Belongs to the TGF-beta family. Detected in blood plasma (at protein level). Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
